body.title: End-to-end IMAP-stub integration test: agent envelope → manifest round-trip
body.result: Slice 2 green-test ships: end-to-end Skeleton+IMAP-stub round-trip verifies envelope→manifest path with suffix-style surface addresses; malformed-envelope branch verifies error-mode contract. 146 passed. agent_datacenter commit 28d9a0a.
body.description:
Slice 2 green-test boundary: Skeleton boots with AnnounceBroker sub-device, a test-agent process sends an IdentityEnvelope to comms://announce via the IMAP stub (AGENT_DATACENTER_TEST_MODE=1), and a Manifest with matching manifest_id appears in comms://announce-events within a bounded wait. This is the verification slice 2 actually shipped — slice 1's round-trip was in-memory; this one exercises the full mailbox path.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/tests/test_announce_integration.py (NEW), possibly /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/tests/conftest.py (shared fixture for booted-skeleton if useful)
**Design rules:** uses existing IMAP stub harness (no Dovecot, no network); test failure = slice 2 doesn't ship; bounded timeout (e.g. 5 seconds) on the announce-events poll so a hung listener fails fast.
**Scope boundary:** in — single round-trip test using IMAP stub. Out — load test, multi-agent concurrent test, slice-3 CC-side adapter test.
**Test plan:** test_announce_round_trip_via_imap_stub — start skeleton with igor profile, send IdentityEnvelope to comms://announce, poll comms://announce-events with timeout, assert manifest.issued_to.agent_id == 'igor' and manifest.tools is non-empty. test_malformed_envelope_returns_error_message — send junk to comms://announce, verify announce-events gets an error message (listener doesn't crash).
